title: LinkedIn Job Details Scraper
description: Extract structured details for one or more public LinkedIn job posting URLs.

urls.title: LinkedIn Job URLs
urls.description: Recommended. Process many LinkedIn job URLs in one Apify run so run startup and storage overhead are shared across results.

url.title: Legacy Single LinkedIn Job URL
url.description: Backward-compatible single job URL. Prefer URLs for normal usage, especially when processing more than one job.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: Use cached data if available to reduce costs and speed up requests.

maximum_cache_age.title: Maximum Cache Age
maximum_cache_age.description: Maximum age of cached data in seconds (default: 2592000 = 30 days). Must be at least 1 second. Only used if use_cache is enabled.
